summary: Created unified SignalSnapshot type composing LocaleSignals, DeviceCapabilitySignals, and RenderingSignals under namespaced keys with collectedAt timestamp and version field. Implemented collectSnapshot() that aggregates all three collectors and returns a frozen immutable object. Added MISSING sentinel constants documenting 'unknown' vs 'unavailable' semantics. Normalized locale-signals.ts doNotTrack fallback from 'unspecified' to canonical 'unknown'. Created barrel export in src/signals/index.ts. All 133 tests pass, lint and typecheck clean.
